data.body: Plan-review PASS (advisory=6, signed). Triage: (1) T8 'respects_artifact_altitude question text undefined in plan' — valid; the design source (DSO gap report FP-1) supplies the exact semantics: 'does the finding demand detail or presume a choice the artifact, at its level, legitimately defers to a child/implementation?' — implementing with that text. (2) G1G2 'test_review_kernel_rules.py:77 hardcodes field count + stale 7-graded-sub-questions comment' — will update the comment (assertion stays valid as both sides grow by 2). (3) G1G2 test-placement — kernel-math tests (contract + validity comparability) go in test_review_kernel_rules.py; the committed_claim discrimination CASES go in plan-review-verifier.eval.yaml with a presence/polarity assertion in test_plan_review_evals.py (honors the AC intent + the reviewer's placement concern). (4) ADR advisories (E6/E1/E3) — creating the ADR at a checkable path (ls-able). No ticket edit (would stale the attestation).
